skills.name: Cleaning Service
skills.description: Cleanses allies with the pride of a cleanup maid. Grants an ally ATK Up and Barrier for 3 turns, and grants self 3 stacks of Chill, then grants self an extra turn. Barrier is proportional to self Max HP.

novaBurst.commonDesc: Restores 1 Toughness to self after using a Skill.

skills.name: Turn-Down Service
skills.description: Attacks all enemies with the resolve of a veteran mercenary. Grants all allies DEF Up for 2 turns, and grants self 1 stack of Awakened Memory (Undispellable). Removes all stacks of Chill and reduces the cooldown of Turn-Down Service by 2 turns if Chill is at max stacks after attacking. DMG is proportional to self Max HP.

skills.name: Ready Maid
skills.description: Grants Emily Barrier for 1 turn at the start of the first battle. Reduces the cooldown of Turn-Down Service by 1 turn after being attacked. Reduces the cooldown of Turn-Down Service by 1 additional turn, then grants self 1 stack of Chill with a 50% chance after being attacked by an attack that targets all. Barrier is proportional to self Max HP.

Barrier is proportional to self Max HP.
